Histopathology Report
Patient: [REDACTED]
Date of Birth: [REDACTED]
Specimen ID: PATH-2026-0042
Date Received: [DATE]

CLINICAL INFORMATION:
Right breast lump, query carcinoma. Core needle biopsy.

MACROSCOPIC DESCRIPTION:
Three cores of pale tan tissue, each approximately 15mm in length.

MICROSCOPIC DESCRIPTION:
Sections show invasive ductal carcinoma, no special type (NST).
Tumour cells are arranged in nests and cords within a desmoplastic stroma.
Nuclear pleomorphism is moderate. Mitotic count: 8 per 10 high-power fields.
No lymphovascular invasion identified. No ductal carcinoma in situ (DCIS) component seen.

IMMUNOHISTOCHEMISTRY:
ER (Oestrogen Receptor): POSITIVE (Allred score 7/8, 90% of cells)
PR (Progesterone Receptor): POSITIVE (Allred score 6/8, 70% of cells)
HER2: NEGATIVE (IHC 1+)
Ki-67 Proliferation Index: 22%

TUMOUR GRADE (Nottingham):
Tubule formation: 3/3
Nuclear pleomorphism: 2/3
Mitotic count: 2/3
Total Grade: 7/9 — Grade 2 (Intermediate)

SURGICAL MARGINS:
Margins clear. Minimum clearance: 3.2mm (posterior margin).

CONCLUSION:
Invasive ductal carcinoma, Grade 2.
ER positive, PR positive, HER2 negative (Luminal B-like subtype).
Margins clear (>3mm).
